title: Tooltip
summary: The tooltip object displays a small text bubble for any element using the `data-tooltip` attribute.

description.main: Use the tooltip object to provide short, supporting information on hover or keyboard focus. The tooltip is applied automatically through the `[data-tooltip]` selector, so no extra class is required. For non-interactive elements, add `tabindex="0"` if the tooltip should also be reachable by keyboard.

attributes.data-tooltip: The text content shown inside the tooltip bubble.
attributes.tabindex: Optional. Add `0` on non-interactive elements to allow keyboard focus and reveal the tooltip on focus.

description.heading: Basic tooltip
description.description: A simple inline element with tooltip text revealed on hover.

description.heading: Keyboard focusable tooltip
description.description: Shows the tooltip on both hover and keyboard focus by using a focusable element.

html.code: <button type="button" data-tooltip="Shown on hover and focus">Focusable trigger</button>

blade.code: <button type="button" data-tooltip="Shown on hover and focus">Focusable trigger</button>

description.heading: Longer tooltip content
description.description: Demonstrates how the tooltip bubble handles a longer message within its max-width.

html.code: Focusable text

blade.code: Focusable text
